goals.title: Implement Skim's M1 through M5 project structure now, preserving exis...
goals.objective: Implement Skim's M1 through M5 project structure now, preserving existing user changes and without committing. Build the smallest functional architecture for: a monorepo Kotlin/Spring Boot backend skeleton with database/API/processing/audio boundaries; Android direct recording permission and upload structure; processing status, retry, and polling structure; and Media3 playback, progress, timestamp seek, and transcript highlight structure. Defer adding or running tests and end-to-end/manual verification until these structural milestones are implemented, per the latest user request.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Implement Skim's M1 through M5 project structure now, preserving existing use...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.

successCriteria.scenario: Run rg -n "RECORD_AUDIO|AudioRecord|MediaRecorder|retry|isPlaying|seekTo|audio" app/src/main/java/com/example/skim; PASS when runtime-permission/recording, retry/status, and Media3 playback seams are each present in Android source.
Later, run ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug and the backend Gradle compile task; PASS when both exit 0 without changing README.md or .idea/.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019f556a-60e5-71f1-8757-29cf3eefee76/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019f556a-60e5-71f1-8757-29cf3eefee76/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
